creator: andreas@bilke.org
text:
Created attachment 254269
Work around patch for authentication issue

With 0.19.3 the authentication for remote WebDAV servers broke (see https://github.com/pimutils/vdirsyncer/issues/1138). They proposed a work around patch in https://github.com/pimutils/vdirsyncer/pull/1141 which was not merged yet.

I added a patch from the referenced PR to our port applying the work around until upstream did something about that issue.
